data.content:
The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but CS0246 occurs because **the generated file is never added to the `Compile` item group**. MSBuild's implicit globs expand at evaluation time (before targets run), so files created during the build are invisible to the compiler unless explicitly included.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `<Compile>` and `<FileWrites>` in the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add to compilation so the compiler sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's implicit globbing happens at evaluation time (before any targets run), so the generated file in `obj/` isn't picked up automatically.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, and also register it in `FileWrites` for clean support.

Let me use the including-generated-files skill since it's directly relevant.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add to compilation so the compiler sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes `GeneratedInfo.cs` into `obj/` at build time, but MSBuild's implicit file globs expand at **evaluation time** (before any targets run). Files created during the build are invisible to the compiler unless explicitly added.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target to:
- `<Compile Include="...">` — tells the compiler to include the generated file
- `<FileWrites Include="...">` — registers it for proper cleanup on `dotnet clean`
